title: Assertion `pC!=0' failed.
poc: CREATE VIEW v0(v0) AS WITH v0 AS(SELECT 0 v0) SELECT(SELECT min(v0) OVER()) FROM v0 GROUP BY v0;
SELECT *FROM v0 v1 JOIN v0 USING(v0) WHERE datetime(v0) = (v0.v0)AND v0 = 10;
key_bug_features: JOIN using a view with conflicting column names
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT id, value FROM t1 WHERE id > 0;
SELECT * FROM v1 v2 JOIN v1 v3 ON v2.id = v3.id WHERE v2.value = 'test' OR v3.value IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM v1 v4 JOIN v1 v5 USING(value) WHERE v4.id = 1 AND v5.id = 2;
